entities.name: PARTICIPATORY VARIETAL SELECTION
entities.description: A selection process among fixed lines by farmers under a target environment to identify preferred cultivars.

entities.name: FIXED LINES
entities.description: Genetic lines used as the basis for selection in the PVS process.

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: The primary participants who evaluate and select cultivars based on their needs.

entities.name: TARGET ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The specific environmental conditions where the varietal selection is conducted.

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY EVALUATION
entities.description: A stage of PVS used to identify the specific needs of farmers regarding cultivars.

entities.name: CULTIVAR
entities.description: A cultivated variety of a plant.

entities.name: SUITABLE MATERIAL
entities.description: Plant materials identified for testing and evaluation by farmers.

entities.name: FARMERS' FIELDS
entities.description: The physical location where experimentation on the acceptability of materials is performed.
